leadingIndicators.name: AI Server Demand Proxy
leadingIndicators.desc: Surge in "Info/Comm Products" (HS Code 8471/8517) signals massive GPU assembly backlog.
leadingIndicators.methodology: Calculation: (Dec 2025 Export Value / Dec 2024 Export Value) - 1. Tracks dollar value of orders received by ODM giants (Foxconn, Quanta) for AI servers.

leadingIndicators.name: Raw Chip Output Signal
leadingIndicators.desc: Rising export value vs. flat volume confirms rising ASP (Super Cycle).
leadingIndicators.methodology: Calculation: (Dec 2025 "Memory" Export Value / Dec 2024 Value). A divergence where Value > Volume indicates increasing Average Selling Price (ASP).

schema.accelerators: AI accelerator specs (brand, product, capacity, bandwidth, price)

helium.notes: Qatar supplies 30% of global high-purity helium; Strait of Hormuz closure disrupting

neon.notes: Alternative sources from US/EU partially offsetting

shipping.notes: Red Sea/Suez diversions adding 10-14 days to Asia-Europe routes

semiconductors.notes: Helium shortage affecting advanced node production

baseline.name: Limited Conflict
baseline.description: Hormuz stays open, limited military engagement, diplomatic off-ramps pursued

escalation.name: Hormuz Disruption
escalation.description: 30-60 day Strait closure, oil supply shock, global recession risk

severe.name: Extended Conflict
severe.description: Prolonged military engagement, sustained supply disruption, stagflation

deescalation.name: Diplomatic Resolution
deescalation.description: Ceasefire, sanctions relief framework, rapid normalization
